## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.11.13

### Camera Live View
- Uses the X-Sense live stream URL path for all X-Sense camera entities, including cameras whose model reports WebRTC.
- Keeps normal camera playback on Home Assistant camera stream support instead of the experimental native WebRTC signaling path.

### Camera Startup
- Avoids retrying the same WebRTC ticket/session when a camera peer leaves before answering, so debug output reports that failure clearly.

### Validation
- Adds regression coverage so WebRTC-marked cameras stay on the X-Sense live URL stream path by default.
- Confirms the full test suite passes with the camera route change.
